perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a black beret, glasses, and a white t-shirt introduces a black box to the camera. (2) The scene shifts to a top-down view as hands open the box, revealing a smartphone with a wood-textured back cover; the phone is then picked up and rotated to show its design. (3) The man reappears, holding the phone and pointing to its wood grain texture and the logo. (4) The phone is shown in a close-up, folding and unfolding repeatedly, highlighting the hinge mechanism. (5) The man is seen in a kitchen setting, holding the phone under a running water faucet to demonstrate water resistance. (6) A sequence of close-ups shows the phone's external screen being used for navigation, gaming, and taking selfies. (7) The man concludes by speaking directly to the camera, holding the phone up.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins. A high-pitched, energetic male voice speaks enthusiastically, introducing the brand and model. (2) The music remains consistent in tempo as the male voice continues a rapid-fire description of the phone's features. (3) Short, percussive sound effects (SFX) punctuate the appearance of on-screen text. (4) The sound of running water is clearly audible as the phone is placed under a faucet. (5) The music continues until the end, fading out as the speaker finishes his final sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c有意思tim哥' and social media icons in the top left corner. (2) Hook Text: 'motorola razr 60 ULTRA' in large, bold letters across the center. (3) Decorative Text: 'PANTONE 山路棕原木色' and '質感滿分' with a playful, variety-show style tone. (4) Functional Text: '80萬次耐折測試' and 'IP48 防塵防潑水設計' appearing with high emphasis. (5) Hook Text: '4吋外螢幕' and '5000萬畫素三鏡頭' highlighting technical specifications.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a black beret and a white short-sleeved t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor setting with a grey wall, a ceiling with recessed lighting, and a kitchen area with a sink and white cabinets.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, natural indoor light.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Unboxing -> Hardware Feature Highlight -> Software/UI Highlight -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional review designed to generate excitement for the Motorola Razr 60 Ultra. It focuses heavily on the unique 'Mountain Trail Wood' texture and the device's durability (fold test and water resistance) and versatility (large external screen), positioning it as a premium, stylish, and functional tech accessory.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is dedicated entirely to showcasing a specific product from Motorola, featuring direct brand mentions and detailed spec callouts.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style, rapid speech, and consistent use of large, colorful Traditional Chinese text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes fast cuts and beat-synced editing to maintain a high level of viewer engagement common in short-form tech unboxing content.
